languages.text: Мелкие ксеносы копошатся, создавая все новые платформы для экспонатов и не обращая на вас никакого внимания.

traits.locale_text: Мелкие ксеносы копошатся, создавая все новые платформы для экспонатов и не обращая на вас никакого внимания.

languages.text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.
languages.original_text: Мелкие ксеносы копошатся, создавая все новые платформы для экспонатов и не обращая на вас никакого внимания.

traits.locale_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.
Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.
Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

languages.text: Unos pequeños xenos se aglomeran, creando más plataformas para la exposición e ignorándote por completo.
languages.original_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

traits.locale_text: Unos pequeños xenos se aglomeran, creando más plataformas para la exposición e ignorándote por completo.

languages.text: 小小的异形在四周蜂拥穿梭，不停制造出更多展品平台，毫不理会你的存在。
languages.original_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

traits.locale_text: 小小的异形在四周蜂拥穿梭，不停制造出更多展品平台，毫不理会你的存在。

languages.text: Une horde de petits xénos se rassemble et s'affaire à créer de plus en plus de plateformes d'exposition sans vous prêter la moindre attention.
languages.original_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

traits.locale_text: Une horde de petits xénos se rassemble et s'affaire à créer de plus en plus de plateformes d'exposition sans vous prêter la moindre attention.

languages.text: Etrafta küçük zeno sürüsü dolaşıyor, sergiler için gittikçe daha fazla platform oluşturuyor ve sana hiç aldırış etmiyorlar.
languages.original_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

traits.locale_text: Etrafta küçük zeno sürüsü dolaşıyor, sergiler için gittikçe daha fazla platform oluşturuyor ve sana hiç aldırış etmiyorlar.

languages.text: 小さな異形生物が群れをなして、展示台をどんどん増やして、あなたには全く気づいていない。
languages.original_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

traits.locale_text: 小さな異形生物が群れをなして、展示台をどんどん増やして、あなたには全く気づいていない。

languages.text: Schwärme von Xenos erstellen immer mehr Plattformen für Exponate und schenken dir keinerlei Beachtung.
languages.original_text: Small xenos swarm around, creating more and more platforms for exhibits and paying no attention to you.

traits.locale_text: Schwärme von Xenos erstellen immer mehr Plattformen für Exponate und schenken dir keinerlei Beachtung.
